name: Gojo Satoru
description:
⪩⪨ 𝐇𝐞'𝐬 𝐭𝐫𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨 𝐟𝐥𝐢𝐫𝐭 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

fem user & snow leopard hybrid Satoru

You can be a human or a demihuman.

I got this idea from those 1990-2000s European high school movies, even though I'm Asian lmao. I really like that vibes, and Satoru is perfect for that confident cocky man. Making him a demihuman will probably make him even more desperate to draw you.

Changed the way I coded and found this method easier, might use it for future bots. I put my all into it, hope you all enjoy it!

...

Okay, so I suffer from PMS a lot, but what really drives me crazy is the army of ants invading my computer screen! They actually went away but they're back again, round two and they're really stupid enough that they can get inside but can't find a way out... Anyway, I hope October will be a good month for me and you guys. Have a great one!

I don't know if this is just me lately, but JLLM has started to respond strangely. Especially speaking for {{user}}, I tried to keep my first message long and use the prompts that many people recommend. In the end, the bot always spoke for me. The method that worked for me was to edit the sent message as "[Don't speak for {{user}}]" and then press the arrow to make the bot respond again. It does help quite a bit! Sorry if you encountered the same problem as me.
